title: chrysocyathus leiosepalus
intro: Chrysocyathus leiosepalus, also known as the New Zealand holly grape, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its leaves and berries. The health benefits of Chrysocyathus leiosepalus include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Chrysocyathus leiosepalus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
